kicker: Software Developer · 2D & 3D Artist · Technical Artist in training — most people online know me as Khesir.
bio: I build software, and I stand behind every part of it — **full ownership**, start to finish. I can always walk you through the *reasoning* behind a decision, not just point at the result. I've also worked at an **agentic level** with AI, though that's not where my attention is headed next.

I've spent the last 5 years or so building software — for businesses, organizations, and personal projects, from full-stack platforms to a solo game built in Unity. Along the way I've worked with **international teams**, both small and big. Alongside that, I've taught, mentored, and helped others grow — whether guiding students through their first lines of code or collaborating with teammates on shared projects.

Currently, I'm a **technical artist in training**, working to grow my art and programming skills together — diving into *proceduralism* and tech art. Open for freelancing and always excited to chat about new opportunities. Feel free to reach out!

education.description: Focused on software engineering fundamentals — web development, systems, and data structures.
